## Testing / 測試

<!-- List the commands or manual checks you ran. / 請列出已執行的指令或手動測試。 -->

- [ ] `go test ./...` (from `engine/`)
- [ ] `dotnet test app/JustHostMC.Core.Tests/JustHostMC.Core.Tests.csproj`
- [ ] I performed any relevant manual testing. / 我已完成相關的手動測試。

## Screenshots / 螢幕截圖

<!-- For user-interface changes, add before/after screenshots. Remove this section when it does not apply. / 若有介面變更，請附上變更前後的螢幕截圖；不適用時請移除此段。 -->

## Checklist / 檢查清單

- [ ] The change is focused and does not include unrelated edits. / 這項變更範圍明確，且未包含無關修改。
- [ ] I updated tests for changed behavior where practical. / 我已在適當情況下更新測試，以涵蓋行為變更。
- [ ] I updated documentation for user-facing or developer-facing changes. / 我已更新與使用者或開發者相關的文件。
- [ ] I regenerated protobuf outputs locally if files under `proto/` changed. / 若修改了 `proto/`，我已在本機重新產生 protobuf 輸出。
- [ ] I did not commit credentials, private server data, or generated build artifacts. / 我未提交憑證、私人伺服器資料或建置產物。

Closes #<!-- issue number, if applicable / 若適用，請填入 issue 編號 -->
